finding: Eligible rows are only research inputs if the global factor gate passes.
Observation-only rows must stay out of candidate construction.
Blocked rows cannot enter candidate construction.
suggested_action: candidate gate is upstream of scoring
examples: 159231 通用航空ETF华宝;159246 创业板人工智能ETF富国;159287 创业板综ETF博时;159387 创业板新能源ETF国泰;560320 N食品ETF富国

finding: Short history blocks candidate use and is not a low score.
examples: 159007 养殖ETF华泰柏瑞;159008 证券ETF景顺;159009 创业板新能源ETF易方达;159013 工业互联网ETF大成;159017 石油ETF工银
